institution.name: George Washington University Hospital
aliases: GW SMHS visiting students lane (covering GW Hospital placement)

searchTermsTried: George Washington University School of Medicine visiting medical student elective international VSLO site:gwu.edu
searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: smhs.gwu.edu accessible; gwhospital.com (clinical site) does not surface a visiting-students lane directly. The lane lives at the SMHS hub. WebFetch returned clean content.

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | School of Medicine and Health Sciences
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Students who take an elective must be enrolled in their senior year of medical school at a U.S. LCME medical school or COCA accredited AACOM member colleges. They must be in good academic standing after completing their core rotations.
candidateFindings.specialtyDecision: Multispecialty per VSLO; named specialty pages found (Dermatology, Orthopaedic Surgery)
caveats: SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — GW SMHS hub; GW Hospital named as placement site but covered as part of system access

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | School of Medicine and Health Sciences
candidateFindings.shortQuote: we will provide ID access for the School of Medicine & Health Sciences (Ross Hall), the GW Hospital, and the Himmelfarb Library

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | School of Medicine and Health Sciences
candidateFindings.shortQuote: The required application fee is $75.00 (due upon acceptance)

candidateFindings.pageTitle: International Clinical Electives Program (ICEP) for International Students
candidateFindings.shortQuote: IMP can only process applications from international students that are current students at one of the ICEP-affiliated sites and have been selected by their home university to participate in an elective at GW.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: International students lane (ICEP) is explicitly restricted to pre-affiliated home universities, not open to general international applicants or IMGs. Main visiting-students hub explicitly restricts to US LCME or COCA AACOM senior-year students.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: gwhospital.com (clinical site) does not directly surface the visiting-students lane; discoverability for non-affiliated international students requires navigating to imp.smhs.gwu.edu and emailing IMP.

nextAction: Eligible for public-safe activation in a future sprint with caveats: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — GW SMHS, not GW Hospital page; (b) MS4 senior year + US LCME or COCA AACOM only; (c) VSLO required; (d) $75 application fee due upon acceptance; (e) GW Hospital named as access site; (f) separate ICEP lane is affiliation-only, NOT a public international pathway — must not be misrepresented as IMG-friendly.
plainEnglishSummary: GW Hospital accepts visiting medical students through GW SMHS's visiting-students program. Only US senior-year (MS4) students from LCME-accredited or COCA-accredited osteopathic schools may apply via VSLO. Application fee is $75 due upon acceptance. The hospital itself is explicitly named as an access site. International students have a separate ICEP lane but it's exchange-agreement-only — not open to general international applicants. Visa and duration not stated on the public hub.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because DC gained a second classified institution with documented audience + application + cost + source-scope evidence; explicit negative finding on international students lane (ICEP is affiliation-only) protects against future IMG-friendly overclaim.
